questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to calculate the total cost of 10 items purchased.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter the price of each item
  • repeat this input process for 10 items
  • calculate the total cost of all the items
  • output the total cost in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
total = 0
for i in range(10):
    price = float(input('Enter price: '))
    total += price
print('Total cost:', total)
